textByHashes.57c0945c577ed21cb4eaec5a91d46bb5e3158af1: Pieces of eight! Pieces of eight!
textByHashes.07c6bcf3deae9e8b7708ce6cde9133c322705b88: Ah, hello Sir. Could you please free me? I seem to have ... OW! What are you doing? That's my spleen!
textByHashes.518f9d6d41281ef143e2571aaebd7a5776b11446: Run fer yer lives lads, it's a monster!
textByHashes.6dbcee59a29d29a08a5e9a85106099927b3840e7: I want guns, lots of guns! I want guns, lots of guns!
textByHashes.2526366e368f17607ed5b2ae913363e35b04bc64: Move it or lose it, move it or lose it.
textByHashes.8acbf4096b0e69fe919f773c96ce4f4fb9c3c851: Don't drop quest items half way through a quest!
textByHashes.4bad225e85726732d306b365225094971f6f5b1b: Way to sail a boat! Way to sail a boat!
textByHashes.f17ca0fecf5e8575ce8359cbb4502fd4b0ad5773: He means you dummy! You dummy!
textByHashes.f1da751e7745d620f91e77ede1815bea2293d1d1: Who's a jinx? Who's a jinx?
textByHashes.61d1dffbfa5bc530d3056c8e0870a3a9dfd47f58: Tag when green light means tickets! Tag when red light means green light!
textByHashes.3ffd70fabf7d85303f502e76846f670f94fe075c: Answer this and I'll give you treasure!
textByHashes.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHashes.109185343840bbe0ca7f83dfee9fb8e1bba9bff1: Awk! Awk! Rum's done! Rum's done!
textByHashes.0ef26f356cefd26d4f2b1d7b426d479ae706b32f: Awk! Feed the fires! Feed the fires!
